headline: Pekalongan flood disrupts urban coastal services
summary: Banjir di Pekalongan menyebabkan genangan di kawasan pesisir perkotaan dan mengganggu layanan permukiman setempat.
summary_id: Banjir di Pekalongan menyebabkan genangan di kawasan pesisir perkotaan dan mengganggu layanan permukiman setempat.
summary_en: Flooding in Pekalongan caused inundation in urban coastal areas and disrupted local neighborhood services.
